Piece by Piece (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,756,635Details
International Box Office $990,280
Worldwide Box Office $10,746,915
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Uninterested in making a traditional film about his life, Pharrell Williams tells his story in a way that sets audience’s imaginations free. Developed from his singular vision, Piece by Piece transports audiences into a LEGO world where anything is possible.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,851,355 (39.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:90.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,865 opening theaters/1,873 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,317,366

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 11th, 2024 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: October 17th, 2024 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
October 17th, 2024 (Wide), released as Život v kocke (Slovakia)
November 6th, 2024 (Wide) (Egypt)
November 7th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
November 7th, 2024 (Wide) (Lebanon)
Video Release: October 29th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for language, some suggestive material and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2843 (cert #55090), 7/17/2024)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Plot point: Biography, Musicians, Singers, Songwriter
Subgenre: Biographical Documentary
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Documentary
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Factual
Production Countries: United States, Denmark
Languages: English

Synopsis

Uninterested in making a traditional film about his life, Pharrell Williams tells his story in a way that sets audience’s imaginations free. Developed from his singular vision, Piece by Piece transports audiences into a LEGO world where anything is possible.
